issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy path scenarios.

scenarios.name: Provision Grafana with Prometheus datasource and Slack alert at 5% error rate
scenarios.rationale: Baseline relies on UI flow and omits the provisioning YAML schema; treatment delivers exact apiVersion 1 datasource, math-expression rule with gt 0.05 threshold, and Slack contact point as documented.

scenarios.name: Export UI-built dashboard via API and auto-provision via file provider
scenarios.rationale: Baseline suggests UI export with an approximate API path; treatment uses the exact /api/dashboards/uid/<uid> endpoint, jq pipeline, and the file-provider provisioning config with the documented path.
